title: Software Engineer Intern
description:

 We are looking for a passionate and enthusiastic Software Engineer Intern to join our development team. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain hands\\-on experience in software development while working remotely with a team of skilled professionals.
   

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Nice to Have (Optional):**

title: JavaScript Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company at the forefront of artificial intelligence and software development. Renowned for its innovative approach to building AI\\-powered solutions, Turing specializes in creating advanced systems that enhance productivity, automate complex tasks, and drive digital transformation across various industries. The company prides itself on fostering a dynamic and inclusive work environment, promoting continuous learning, and leveraging cutting\\-edge technology to solve real\\-world problems. With a global footprint and a commitment to excellence, Turing is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what is possible with AI and software engineering.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled software engineer (tech lead level) to join our innovative team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role is pivotal in developing datasets that enable LLMs to effectively address realistic software engineering challenges. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in analyzing and working with high\\-quality public repositories, automating development environments, and assessing code quality. Your expertise will directly influence the creation of verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories, utilizing a synthetic approach with human\\-in\\-the\\-loop methodologies. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to pioneering research that bridges software engineering and artificial intelligence.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering.
* Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript, with a solid understanding of modern development practices.
* Experience with version control systems, particularly Git, and containerization tools such as Docker.
* Strong ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex codebases.
* Hands\\-on experience in setting up and automating development environments.
* Ability to run, test, and troubleshoot real\\-world projects locally.
* Experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is highly desirable.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues reported in GitHub repositories across trending open\\-source libraries.
* Set up, configure, and automate development environments, including Dockerization and environment management.
* Evaluate unit test coverage and assess the quality of codebases to ensure robustness and reliability.
* Modify and execute codebases locally to evaluate LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and code understanding tasks.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to identify repositories and issues that pose challenges for LLMs, aiding in dataset creation and evaluation.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative team environment and ensuring high\\-quality deliverables.
* Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance project workflows and automation processes.


**Benefits**
 At Turing, we believe in rewarding talent and fostering a supportive work environment. As part of our team, you will enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from anywhere in the world. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside industry\\-leading experts, gaining valuable experience and expanding your professional skill set. We offer competitive compensation based on your expertise and contributions. Additionally, you will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization that values innovation, diversity, and inclusion. Our culture encourages continuous learning and provides opportunities for career growth within the company.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to providing a workplace free from discrimination and harassment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe that a diverse team drives innovation and excellence, and we are committed to fostering a culture where everyone can thrive.

title: Software Engineer-React
description:
**About The Company**
 InRhythm is a leading technology consulting firm dedicated to transforming businesses through innovative digital solutions. Renowned for its expertise in software development, enterprise modernization, and digital strategy, InRhythm partners with organizations across various industries to deliver impactful, scalable, and future\\-proof applications. The company fosters a culture of continuous learning, collaboration, and excellence, ensuring its teams stay at the forefront of technological advancements. With a commitment to quality and client satisfaction, InRhythm prides itself on building long\\-term relationships and creating value\\-driven solutions that meet the evolving needs of its clients.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Lead Software (UI \\- React) Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role requires a passionate professional with extensive experience in front\\-end development, particularly using React.js, to lead the design, development, and deployment of sophisticated web applications. The successful candidate will take ownership of the entire software development lifecycle, from initial assessment to final delivery, ensuring high\\-quality, scalable, and efficient solutions. As a leader, you will mentor and coach engineers, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous improvement. Your expertise will directly influence the digital transformation initiatives of our clients, impacting hundreds of thousands to millions of users worldwide.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess over 10 years of experience in enterprise application development and platform modernization, with a strong emphasis on web applications built using React.js, Node.js, Redux, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and REST APIs. A minimum of 2 years of leadership consulting experience working closely with enterprise clients is essential. Proven experience in developing reusable component libraries aligned with Design Language Systems, along with a solid understanding of browser performance optimization, is required. Familiarity with CI/CD practices, testing frameworks, GraphQL, Websockets, server\\-side rendering, and containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes will set you apart. Strong communication skills, the ability to define business needs, and the capacity to create detailed architecture diagrams are also critical for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Lead Software (UI \\- React) Engineer at InRhythm, your responsibilities will include designing, developing, and testing modern web applications in collaboration with cross\\-functional teams comprising Software Engineers and Product Managers. You will lead technical discussions, contribute to architectural decisions, and ensure best practices are followed throughout the development process. Your role will involve actively participating in agile ceremonies, supporting the growth of the Web Practice by participating in interviews, tech talks, and workshops, and staying current with industry trends. Additionally, you will mentor junior engineers, promote code quality, and advocate for innovative solutions that enhance user experience and system performance. You will also be responsible for creating comprehensive solution and architecture diagrams to communicate technical ideas effectively to stakeholders.
   

  

**Benefits**
 InRhythm offers a competitive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of its employees. This includes comprehensive health insurance plans, retirement savings options, and paid time off to promote work\\-life balance. The company encourages continuous learning through access to training programs, certifications, and industry conferences. Employees also benefit from a collaborative and inclusive work environment that fosters innovation and creativity. Flexible work arrangements and opportunities for career advancement are integral parts of the company's commitment to employee satisfaction. At InRhythm, you will find a supportive culture that values your contributions and invests in your development as a leader in technology.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 InRhythm is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We believe that a diverse team enhances our ability to innovate and deliver exceptional solutions to our clients. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any protected characteristic. We are dedicated to creating an environment where every employee feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their best.
